verses.1: Not to us, LORD, not to us,
verses.3: But our God is in the heavens.
verses.4: Their idols are silver and gold,
verses.5: They have mouths, but they don’t speak.
verses.6: They have ears, but they don’t hear.
verses.7: They have hands, but they don’t feel.
verses.8: Those who make them will be like them;
verses.10: House of Aaron, trust in the LORD!
verses.11: You who fear the LORD, trust in the LORD!
verses.12: The LORD remembers us. He will bless us.
verses.13: He will bless those who fear the LORD,
verses.14: May the LORD increase you more and more,
verses.15: Blessed are you by the LORD,
verses.16: The heavens are the LORD’s heavens,
verses.17: The dead don’t praise the LORD,
verses.18: but we will bless the LORD,
